new_claims.claim_text: One of two US pilots who went missing after being downed over Iran has been RESCUED, per CBS
TRUMP JUST FIRED 3 GENERALS IN ONE DAY FOR REFUSING TO PUT TROOPS IN IRAN.
A fishing vessel is on fire in the Persian Gulf, right off the Strait of Hormuz.
new_claims.notes: Reported by a medium-trust account, but context/cause for the fire is unclear, could be related to conflict.

updated_claims.id: JPMorgan publishes countdown to when each continent could run out of fuel amid a Strait of Hormuz blockade
updated_claims.notes: @SupplySignalAI explicitly states it's being 'misread hard' and refers to arrival of tankers already at sea, not actual fuel depletion.
